footer.about: AI-powered Google Shopping feed optimization for stores that want fewer disapprovals, better CTR, and more revenue per click.

exitPopup.title: Before you go — your Google Shopping feed might be wasting 34243$ right now
exitPopup.lead: Get a free 60-second audit. See the exact words missing from your titles, the disapprovals you don’t know about, and the prioritised fixes that move the needle.
exitPopup.trust: No signup. No credit card. Trusted by 800+ Google Shopping advertisers.

auditBanner.title: See what's costing you clicks.
auditBanner.lead: Paste your feed URL. We check every product against Google's policy and against the listings winning your category, then return a ranked fix list — titles, images, attributes.
auditBanner.metaLine: Free. No signup. Results in 60 seconds.
